ohtani.title: Cardinals win sixth straight on back of McGreevy
ohtani.blurb: Michael McGreevy tosses six scoreless innings and Jordan Walker homers as the Cardinals win their sixth straight game against the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Happ, Imanaga lead Cubs to 2-0 win
imanaga.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run and Shota Imanaga strikes out five in seven scoreless frames, leading the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the D-backs

suzuki.title: Happ, Imanaga lead Cubs to 2-0 win
suzuki.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run and Shota Imanaga strikes out five in seven scoreless frames, leading the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the D-backs

yoshida.title: Christian Walker, Brice Matthews homer in Astros' win
yoshida.blurb: Christian Walker and Brice Matthews combine to drive in five runs in the Astros' 6-3 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Kazuma Okamoto homers in Blue Jays' comeback win
okamoto.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hammers a home run and the Blue Jays score eight in the 8th inning as the Blue Jays beat the Twins, 11-4

murakami.title: Sean Burke strikes out eight in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Sean Burke strikes out eight and Sam Antonacci hits a double in the White Sox 4-0 win over the Padres
